textByHash.11c74192b96c76b4f4877ce19b0860c63a5e0ce2: Ha! I nose the truth when I 'ears it! Get it? Get it? Nose the truth?
textByHash.1d77f87da3ba76d25902852fb4f7c7996274b978: Da big ugly's ere in Vu'rock.
textByHash.338e456120925e2e0507b184369e5b237492592c: I will absolutely not be doing that.
textByHash.35f6bd4565359e3e3502bdc9fc5ec0e97e20d92e: 'e is, e is. He stays in the Flying Horse dun 'e?
textByHash.3eef93e87620d1f207c04ce109b560794495da38: We'll smell your cat, of course!
textByHash.49945cda322dfb5527dc1eec8e68ca8e85bf4e69: Right, if you catch 8 ratsies with your cat...
textByHash.4b1fa15bf887539a1317fc6554688980dbefa5bc: I don't know. Seems a bit weird.
textByHash.536526b34b9fa9c61158e7e75be2aba4ad8d8fb7: We'll set her a task, see how it goes.
textByHash.5478bb17c6312c7e2c5ed9614be110e837e3da6f: Why do we care what zey wants let's get back to rat splattin'.
textByHash.58caa749a86cc78e90eab16d1036a10930002b2d: Oh yes, we know lots about ratcatching.
textByHash.659a1550b371c44dac02c433988ff296acfe067c: I don't think cats even do tricks.
textByHash.7b2663e3f111f48f27d43682123d5191fcbffca0: She's got a secret den in Port Sarim!
textByHash.82f003b432db384feed34b79a7226fa837eb3a4f: Why are you talking like that?
textByHash.8d24c15b53aa878158adb0b260e77159299b0026: Go on then, go splat them ratsies!
textByHash.9200d7f3c524d016188a8e42683c5d5c7be05ff1: We'll set them a task, see how it goes.
textByHash.9d90760c0a89e00a4c889a3de50eb8adf51835a7: Da big ugly! Ha that's a good one. 'E is big n ugly though isn't e, serve him right for all the fights e get's in.
textByHash.a28ccc7f64b21c135b40049ce07797a24bb070b4: Oh yes, you're a real ratcatching prodigy.
textByHash.a2b21c656aff2a58c9f5432093b580435fc163a3: No! I'm not talking to some stranger in a sewer.
textByHash.b4b117ce7c08a656d226f3d27114d11d80bf4080: Jimmy Dazzler hangs out in Ardougne.
textByHash.c11baad617a4c36553e60bffe7432c428d3c24d5: He's normally in the Flying Horse Inn.
textByHash.ccede73d0210a2e32d89bd025646f0ab38773365: She's travels about a bit, but I reckon Port Sarim.
textByHash.df9fddab3f59491d056b5d7753497a1afe9ed740: You can stick all the ratsies your cat splats on it.
textByHash.e5a6734b13c9a13d883bcc9bca91dd74a9d88d25: Come on, it's not that funny.
textByHash.e607af720682f92c16949efa1638f43899779c98: Our eye jokes are even cornea!
textByHash.e961410a87511663ad89b8d8d7aaa98bb008930c: So did you splat them ratsies or what?
textByHash.e9e7e962cbeaf7c6a511ac0c380298840ea7a98b: Tell 'im we said 'ello. Will ye? She then breaks out in a burst of girly giggles.
textByHash.f45538394d6433a83a7f7d03a55bb4ea30ba2540: We'll set him a task, see how it goes.
